# Ionicons

- Upstream: https://github.com/ionic-team/ionicons
- Site: https://ionic.io/ionicons
- License: MIT (see `LICENSE`)
- Acquired: 2026-04-21 via `git clone --depth 1`
- Layout: flat `icons/` directory

## Count

- Total icons: **1357** (three styles per name: default iOS-outline, `-outline`, `-sharp`)
- Size on disk: ~5.3 MB

## Sample filenames

```
accessibility.svg
accessibility-outline.svg
accessibility-sharp.svg
add.svg
add-outline.svg
add-sharp.svg
add-circle.svg
add-circle-outline.svg
add-circle-sharp.svg
airplane.svg
airplane-outline.svg
airplane-sharp.svg
alarm.svg
alarm-outline.svg
alarm-sharp.svg
albums.svg
albums-outline.svg
albums-sharp.svg
alert.svg
alert-circle.svg
```

## Notes

- Three-style set: the bare filename is the iOS default (soft filled), `-outline` is outlined, `-sharp` is the harder Material-style variant.
- Designed for mobile first; reads at small sizes well.
- Roughly 452 unique names x 3 styles = ~1357 files.
- Visual character: 512x512 viewbox, generous curves on the iOS default, geometric on sharp.
